name: CaptchaRenderProps
description: Props passed to the consumer's `render` component.

entries.name: setToken
entries.description: Call once the user solves the captcha.

entries.name: clearToken
entries.description: Call on error/expire to clear the token.

entries.name: setReset
entries.description:
Register your widget's `reset()`. Forms call it after a failed
submission since captcha tokens are single-use. Pass `null` on unmount.
